channel.title: B's Tweet Digest
channel.itunes:author: B
channel.itunes:summary: Daily distilled learnings from Twitter bookmarks
channel.description: Daily distilled learnings from Twitter bookmarks

item.title: Episode 1 - Vibe Coding, Personal OS, and AI Employees
item.description: Naval on vibe coding as the new product management. Greg Isenberg's Obsidian + Claude Code personal OS framework. Johann Sath on OpenClaw setups. Dan Shipper on personal software and agent relationships.
